microsoft_ft: Drove **GenAI adoption measurement** strategy for Azure's resilience portfolio, defining KPIs, data standards, and reporting requirements that gave senior stakeholders visibility into program health across **45+ annual drills**.

Built a **Resilience Automation Platform** from 0→1, translating stakeholder needs into product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and scaled execution firm-wide.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation model.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring Finance, Legal, and Infra alignment.

Engineered an **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21%—demonstrating hands-on use of AI-enabled tools to accelerate team execution.

Translated complex resilience data into **actionable dashboards** for senior stakeholders across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp, driving $14M+ in business impact through data-informed decision-making.

Partnered with platform and infrastructure teams to improve **data pipelines and reporting architecture**, standardizing data quality practices that enabled consistent KPI tracking across enterprise partner integrations.
microsoft_2023: Championed **AI-driven product adoption** for code generation workflows, conducting user demos and training that drove utilization across 14 key teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly through scalable workflow improvements.

Shaped the product roadmap by facilitating **11+ stakeholder interviews** with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, directly influencing the inclusion of intent-based YAML generation as a priority capability.

Improved **data quality and actionable insight delivery** by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, cutting stakeholder lookup time by **83%**.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, translating business priorities into a scalable product roadmap across 140+ teams.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual toil per region**, building a data-backed product strategy to automate critical paths and improve adoption of streamlined launch workflows.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, define KPIs, and prioritize high-impact investments with clear, data-driven reporting outputs.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **legacy OS migration strategy** for a 2,000+ unit pilot, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and achieving zero operational downtime through rigorous data-driven dependency analysis and stakeholder coordination.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process across IT, Operations, and Engineering teams.

Drove cross-functional alignment to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and improving data pipeline reliability across a complex, multi-team robotics infrastructure.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals, translating customer needs into a scalable CRM process with measurable adoption and conversion outcomes.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a data-informed go-to-market strategy, optimizing digital channels and translating performance insights into actionable product improvements.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and delivering a clear, data-backed reporting output to inform strategic pricing adjustments.
